from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql import types as T
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.types import *
from delta.tables import DeltaTable

# Partitioning
# spark.conf.set("spark.sql.shuffle.partitions", "2000")   # tune later if partitions are too small/large

# Shuffle + heartbeat stability
#spark.conf.set("spark.network.timeout", "800s")
#spark.conf.set("spark.executor.heartbeatInterval", "60s")
spark.conf.set("spark.shuffle.io.maxRetries", "10")
spark.conf.set("spark.shuffle.io.retryWait", "10s")

# Skew handling
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.adaptive.enabled", "true")

# Broadcast joins
spark.conf.set("spark.sql.autoBroadcastJoinThreshold", -1)  # disable auto

# =====================
# CONFIG
# =====================
INPUT_JSON_PATH = "abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/works_csv_final/"
#INPUT_JSON_PATH = "abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/data/works/*/*.gz"
OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH ="abfss://openalex@dloadatdl.dfs.core.windows.net/processed_v1/doi_tidy_all"

# =====================
# LOAD JSON
# =====================
#works_raw = spark.read.json(INPUT_JSON_PATH).alias("w")
#works_raw = spark.read.option("multiline", "true").json(INPUT_JSON_PATH).alias("w")
#works_raw = spark.read.option("multiline", "true").schema(works_schema).json(INPUT_JSON_PATH)
df = spark.read.format("delta").load(INPUT_JSON_PATH)
#df.printSchema()
#df.show(20, truncate=False)

from pyspark.sql import SparkSession, Window
# --- Apply SQL logic in PySpark ---

# Grouping fields (same as SQL GROUP BY)
group_fields = [
    "year",
    "type",
    "type_crossref",
    "sources_id",
    "journal_issn_l",
    "oa_status",
    "license",
    "version",
    "host_type"
]

# Aggregations
agg_df = df.groupBy(group_fields).agg(
    F.count("*").alias("Articles"),
    F.sum(F.col("cited_by_count").cast("long")).alias("cited_by_count"),
    F.sum(F.col("cited_works_count").cast("long")).alias("cited_works_count"),
    F.concat_ws("", F.collect_list("topic_list")).alias("topic_list")  # string_agg with no delimiter
)

# Add fixed & duplicate fields
agg_df = agg_df.withColumn("Is_Article", F.lit(1)) \
    .withColumn("sources_id_as_stated", F.col("sources_id")) \
    .withColumn("issn_l", F.col("journal_issn_l")) \
    .withColumn("issn_l_as_stated", F.col("journal_issn_l"))

# Add row_number like SQL
#w = Window.orderBy(F.monotonically_increasing_id())
#agg_df = agg_df.withColumn("DOI_tidy_ID", F.row_number().over(w))
agg_df = agg_df.withColumn("DOI_tidy_ID", F.monotonically_increasing_id())

# Reorder columns to match SQL output
final_cols = [
    "DOI_tidy_ID", "year", "type", "type_crossref", "sources_id", "sources_id_as_stated",
    "issn_l", "issn_l_as_stated", "oa_status", "license", "version", "host_type",
    "Is_Article", "Articles", "cited_by_count", "cited_works_count", "topic_list"
]
result_df = agg_df.select(final_cols)

(
    result_df
    .write
    .format("delta")   # Use Delta format
    .mode("overwrite") # Overwrite existing data
    .save(OUTPUT_FINAL_PATH)
)
